title: Odyssey Resewn
description: A vanilla+ modpack built around socialization on our Official Sever!
body:
# Odyssey Resewn
A modpack made for a server with friends. Decided to upload to make it easier to find and in case anyone else ever wanted to play it. This is a vanilla+ modpack and it contains all of the client side mods.

## Installation
1. Click the install button
2. Once the pack is finished installing click on it to go to the details of the pack
3. Go to the options tab
4. Check the box under Java Memory
5. Change the number on the right to allocate more ram. Alternatively you can drag the slider to achieve the same result
###    **Note:**
**If you do not allocate more than the default 2048MB/2GB of RAM your game will get stuck upon trying to create a minecraft world**

## Content
- Magic
- New Weapon Types With Overhauled Combat
- New Unique Weapons
- Archery Overhaul
- New Decorations
- Create
- Significantly Improved Archeology
- Buildable Trains and Other Machines
- More Challenging Difficulty That Scales With The Dimension and Structure
- A Variety of New Building Blocks

## Mods Included
